build.name: AlignMD
build.summary: Two-sided healthcare staffing platform — clinicians (NP/PA/MD/DO/CRNA/PT/OT/SLP) matched to facility jobs by a credential-aware, rule-based match score.
build.next_action: AlignMD is built (all 7 phases) and deployed live at alignmd.vercel.app — Supabase env vars wired, homepage returning 200. Remaining: confirm migrations 0005-0009 ran by testing signup on the live site; optionally add CLAUDE_API_KEY for the security-review GitHub Action.

phases.name: Security foundation
phases.detail: Nine Supabase migrations: schema (~18 tables), audit-trail triggers, row-level security, app bootstrap, Phase-1 finish, Phase-3 schema, portals, licensing, reporting.

phases.name: Provider CRM core
phases.detail: Provider profiles, credential tracking, 30/60/90-day expiry tracker + daily alerter, permissioned document upload, activity log, pipeline board, dashboard, availability, archive, input validation, SSN in a privileged-only table.

phases.name: Jobs + Matching
phases.detail: Facility and job profiles, the rule-based match engine (job to ranked clinicians, advisory tiers, compact-license aware), submissions pipeline, and a bulk CSV importer. The working MVP.

phases.name: Provider intake & onboarding
phases.detail: Self-service application/intake survey, verified references, printable CV view, plus provider and facility-contact self-service portals.

phases.name: Verification & screening
phases.detail: Background / malpractice / reference verification workflow, a vendor-adapter scaffold (manual mode, auto-switches to a vendor when an API key is set), and a credentialing timeline.

phases.name: State license assistant
phases.detail: Per-state license application assistant — start applications, track status, pre-fill from the provider's profile and credentials.

phases.name: Reporting, comms & scale
phases.detail: Submissions / fills / time-to-fill reporting, email + SMS outreach drafts, and server-side pagination on the large lists.
